stories.title: FIFA Triples World Cup Final Ticket Prices to $33K
stories.desc: FIFA tripled best available World Cup final tickets to $32,970 for the July 19 match at MetLife Stadium, drawing criticism from Congress over pricing transparency.

stories.title: Shakira Releases FIFA World Cup 2026 Anthem Teaser
stories.desc: Shakira teased 'Dai Dai' featuring Burna Boy, her fourth official World Cup anthem, set to release May 14 from Maracaná Stadium.

stories.title: Trump Comments on World Cup Ticket Pricing
stories.desc: President Trump said he would not pay $1,000 for World Cup group stage tickets, expressing disappointment that his supporters may be priced out.

stories.title: Kansas City Awaits Late World Cup Booking Surge
stories.desc: Kansas City tourism leaders expect late bookings from Argentina, Ecuador, and Netherlands fans despite weaker-than-expected hotel reservations.

stories.title: Panini 2026 Album Features 980 Stickers
stories.desc: Panini launched the largest World Cup sticker album ever with 980 stickers including 12 exclusive Coca-Cola stickers hidden in bottle labels.

stories.title: 14 Exclusive Panini Stickers Not in Standard Packs
stories.desc: The Panini 2026 album includes 14 exclusive stickers available only through Coca-Cola bottles and special bundles, making completion challenging.
